rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §22.0514, which governs exhaustion of administrative remedies before suing school district employees.
quote: A person may not file suit against a professional employee of a school district unless the person has exhausted the remedies provided by the school district for resolving the complaint.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text addresses an entirely unrelated subject area.
